data.title: Arthur Hayes Comments on U.S. Treasury Yields
data.description: According to Odaily, Arthur Hayes recently expressed concerns on X about the need for increased efforts to manage the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield. Hayes suggested that it might be beneficial to contact Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell to address the situation.

data.title: U.S. House Advances Trump's Tax Cut and Debt Ceiling Plan
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. House of Representatives has approved a plan to advance U.S. President Donald Trump's tax cut measures and increase the debt ceiling. This development marks a significant step in Trump's economic agenda, aiming to stimulate growth and address fiscal challenges. The decision reflects ongoing legislative efforts to implement policies that could impact the nation's financial landscape.

data.title: U.S. House of Representatives passes plan to advance Trump's tax cuts, raise debt ceiling
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. House of Representatives passed a plan to advance U.S. President Trump's tax cuts and raise the debt ceiling. (Jinshi)

data.title: Arthur Hayes: It's time for Powell to "step up" and keep the 10-year Treasury yield under control
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arthur Hayes wrote in X, "Oops, more needs to be done to keep the 10-year Treasury yield under control. Better call Powell and tell him it's time to step up."

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 847 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 5,645 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the US Bitcoin ETF had a net outflow of 847 BTC today, and the Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of 5,645 ETH.

data.description:

data.title: AI-generated content needs blockchain before trust in digital media collapses
data.description:
Opinion by: Roman Cyganov, founder and CEO of AntixIn the fall of 2023, Hollywood writers took a stand against AI’s encroachment on their craft. The fear: AI would churn out scripts and erode authentic storytelling. Fast forward a year later, and a public service ad featuring deepfake versions of celebrities like Taylor Swift and Tom Hanks surfaced, warning against election disinformation.  We are a few months into 2025
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ai-generated-content-needs-blockchain?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto tax hike dropped from Germany’s new coalition agreement
data.description:
A plan to raise tax on cryptocurrency investments is evidently missing from the coalition agreement approved by the parties set to form the new German government. The suggested tax reform sought to remove a tax exemption for crypto investors and bump the levy on private capital gains to 30%. The idea was put forward by […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-tax-hike-dropped-germany/

data.title: Guns N' Roses Guitarist Slash Quits Twitter After Solana Meme Coin Hack
data.description:
The guitar legend has abandoned the social platform after his account was hacked to promote a Solana meme coin.
source: https://decrypt.co/314305/guns-n-roses-guitarist-slash-quits-twitter-after-solana-meme-coin-hack

data.title: A whale sold 28,999 ETH at an average price of $1,559 to repay debt
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookochain monitoring, a whale has just sold 28,999 ETH (US$45.2 million) at an average price of US$1,559 to repay debts.
